title: Search Files
name: search_files
description: Search for a pattern in files. Supports regex patterns. Returns matching lines with file paths and line numbers. Use path to scope the search directory, file_glob to filter file types.

pattern.description: The regex pattern to search for.

path.description: Directory to search in. Defaults to current working directory.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default: 50.

author: admin
